---
title: Numerical Methods
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---
I plan to put together short explanations and animations on various numerical methods and math-related topics here. It will take me a long time to put this together totally. So, please be patient.

This page was inspired by John H Mathew's website [@mathewsSite]. In 2019, the page was taken down. I tried contacting Cal State Fullerton in 2019 but they did not respond. Fastforward to April-2026, I realized I could pull it back from the Internet Archive (The Wayback Machine) at least partially. Internet Archive copy: <https://web.archive.org/web/20190808102217/http://mathfaculty.fullerton.edu/mathews/n2003/NumericalUndergradMod.html>. Therefore, you will notice that this is inspired from his page.

## Function Approximation

### Function Approximation at a Point

- [Taylor Series](taylor-series.qmd)

- [Padé approximant](pade-approximant.qmd)

- Laurent series

### Others

- Power Series

- Fourier series

## Interpolation

- Lagrange Polynomials

## Solutions of Equations in One Variable

## Numerical Differentiation

## Numerical Integration

## Ordinary Differential Equation Solvers

## Direct Methods for Linear Systems of equations

## Iterative Techniques for Linear Systems

## Solvers for Nonlinear Systems of Equations

## Fitting

- [regularizeNd Series](../regularizeNd/index.qmd)
